content.body:
printExperimentalWarnings() runs after runtime context files are
generated and prints a ⚠ notice for each adapter carrying experimental
events, telling the user capture may be less reliable. Tests verify the
warning fires for codex/cline and is absent for claude-only installs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(mrp): warn at init time when adapter has experimental MRP events
